subcodes.first_line: O servant! Give thanks unto God, thy Lord, inasmuch as thy name hath been present before His Countenance and the gaze of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, hath been directed towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد ان اشکر الله ربک بما حضر اسمک لدی الوجه و توجه الیه لحاظ ربک العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wisdom [hikmat], @high station of the true believer
